title: Determination of Protein Levels of Browning Genes in Murine Adipose Tissues by Western Blotting
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kbfcsjn
materials: Unpack the NUPAGE 10% Bis-Tris gel and remove the white plastic strip at the bottom and comb. 10-well NUPAGE 10% Bis-Tris gel Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #NP0301BOX 12-well NUPAGE 10% Tris-Bis gel Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #NP0302BOX
Use the Blotting roller to eliminate air bubbles.

Detect UCP-1 and PGC-1α with SuperSignal™ West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate. -Mix equal volumes of reagent 1 and 2 (1 ml in total), cover tube with tinfoil. -Place the membrane in transparent foil. -Incubate with substrate mixture. -Expose to chemiluminescence (lumi-imager, Chemidoc XRS+ Image Lab™ Software, 1708265 ,Bio-Rad). SuperSignal™ West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #34095

Strip membrane for re-blotting (Re-Blot Plus Mild antibody stripping solution). -Wash away substrate for 15 min in TBST. -Incubate the membrane in 5 ml stripping buffer (1X in MilliQ water) for 15 min at room temperature. -Wash shortly in TBST. Re-Blot Plus Mild antibody stripping solution Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #2502

steps.title: Add protein lysis buffer RL to...
steps.instruction: Add protein lysis buffer RL to tissues (volume of buffer (µl) = tissue weight in mg x 4) in 1.5 ml tube with glass beads. *Protein lysis buffer RL (10 ml): -1 ml 100 mM Na 2 PO 4 (10 mM) /1.5 M sodium chloride NaCl (0.15 M) -400µl 25% Triton-X-100 (1%) -100µl 10% sodium dodecyl sulfate (0.1%) -1 ml 5% sodium deoxycholate (0.5%) -1 ml 2% sodium azide (0.2%) -6.5 ml MilliQ water *Add fresh 1/100 EDTA and phosphatase and protease inhibitor cocktail to buffer. HALT phosphatase and protease inhibitor cocktail (100x) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #78442

steps.title: Homogenize tissues using a Fastprep Ribolyser...
steps.instruction: Homogenize tissues using a Fastprep Ribolyser (MP Biomedicals, Elsene, Belgium): speed 6 time 40 sec x2, keep on ice in between.

steps.title: Centrifuge at +4°C, 20 min 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at +4°C, 20 min 13000 rpm.

steps.title: Collect supernatans and transfer to new labeled eppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Collect supernatans and transfer to new labeled eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Measure protein concentration using the Pierce...
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration using the Pierce BCA protein assay: -Make standard curve with bovine serum albumin (2 mg/ml): 1 mg/ml, 500 µg/ml, 250 µg/ml, 125 µg/ml, 62.5 µg/ml, 31.25 µg/ml, 15.625 µg/ml, 7.8125 µg/ml. Dilutions are made with MilliQ water. -Make dilutions of protein extracts: 1/50 and 1/100 in MilliQ water. -Apply 50 µl of each standard and sample (in duplicate) to a 96-well plate. -Mix reagent A (50 parts) with reagent B (1 part) of BCA protein assay and apply 200µl/well -Incubate plate for 30 min at room temperature in the dark -Measure absorbance at 550 nm on the microplate reader (ELx808IU, Biotek) using the Gen5 software (Biotek). -Average protein concentrations/sample. Pierce BCA protein assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #23225 Bovine serum albumin 2 mg/ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #23209

steps.title: Prepare protein samples for loading
steps.instruction: Prepare protein samples for loading: combine 50 µg of protein with xµl MilliQ water (12 and 25µl in total for a 12- and 10-well gel) and xµl NUPAGE LDS sample buffer (4x) containing β-mercaptoethanol (20:1). NUPAGE LDS sample buffer (4x) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #NP0007 b-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3148-25ML

steps.title: Mount the gel cassette in the...
steps.instruction: Mount the gel cassette in the running tank (X-Cell Sure Lock, Life Technologies).

steps.title: Fill the tank with 1x NUPAGE...
steps.instruction: Fill the tank with 1x NUPAGE MOPS SDS running buffer (20x), supplemented with 500 µl NUPAGE antioxidant. 1x NUPAGE MOPS SDS running buffer (20x) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #NP0001 NUPAGE antioxidant Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #NP0005

steps.title: Heat protein samples for 5 min...
steps.instruction: Heat protein samples for 5 min in heat block at 95°C.

steps.title: Load the samples and 8µl of...
steps.instruction: Load the samples and 8µl of Pageruler prestained protein ladder (10 – 180 kDa). Ladder contains two reference bands orange = 70 kDa and green = 10 kDa. Pageruler Prestained Protein Ladder Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #26616

steps.title: Close the tank carefully and connect...
steps.instruction: Close the tank carefully and connect to power supply Powerease 500 (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

steps.title: Assemble the iBlot transfer stacks on...
steps.instruction: Assemble the iBlot transfer stacks on the iBlot gel transfer device (IB1001, Thermo Fisher Scientific): iBlot NC anode stock bottom-mini (04-BLT-BM-UN002, Thermo Fisher Scientific), gel, presoaked in deionized water iBlot filter paper, iBlot cathode stock Top-mini containing nitrocellulose membrane (06-BLT-BM-UN001). iBlot Gel Transfer Stacks, Nitrocellulose, Regular Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #IB301001

steps.title: Place the Disposable Sponge with the...
steps.instruction: Place the Disposable Sponge with the metal contact on the upper right corner of the lid.

steps.title: Close the lid and secure the latch
steps.instruction: Close the lid and secure the latch. The red light is on indicating a closed circuit.

steps.title: Select program P1 (25V, 6 min) and press Start/Stop button
steps.instruction: Select program P1 (25V, 6 min) and press Start/Stop button. The red light changes to green.

steps.title: After transfer, disassemble the stack and remove the membrane
steps.instruction: After transfer, disassemble the stack and remove the membrane.

steps.title: Block the membrane for 2-3hrs in...
steps.instruction: Block the membrane for 2-3hrs in TBST supplemented with 5% milk (Blotting Grade Blocker) on shaker at room temperature. *10x TBS (1L): -24g Tris Base -88g NaCl -Adjust pH to 7.6 -Add deionized water to 1L *TBST (1L): -100 ml 10x TBS -0.5 ml Tween -20 (0.05%) -Add deionized water to 1L Blotting Grade Blocker Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #170-6404

steps.title: Add primary antibody and cover
steps.instruction: Add primary antibody and cover: a. rabbit anti-mouse polyclonal antibody directed to uncoupling protein-1: 1/2000 in TBST supplemented with 5% BSA b. rabbit anti-mouse polyclonal antibody directed to peroxisome proliferator activated receptor gamma cofactor 1α: 1/4000 in TBST supplemented with 5% milk Bovine serum albumin Fraction V Roche Catalog #10735086001 Rabbit anti-mouse pAb UCP-1 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #U6382 Rabbit anti-mouse pAb PGC1a Contributed by users Catalog #NBP1-04676

steps.title: Incubate overnight at +4°C on shaker
steps.instruction: Incubate overnight at +4°C on shaker.

steps.title: Wash membrane 3 x 5 min in TBST
steps.instruction: Wash membrane 3 x 5 min in TBST.

steps.title: Apply secondary horse radish peroxidase (HRP)-labeled...
steps.instruction: Apply secondary horse radish peroxidase (HRP)-labeled Goat anti-Rabbit antibody (1/2000) in TBST supplemented with 5% milk. Horse radish peroxidase-labeled Goat anti-rabbit IgGs Contributed by users Catalog #P0448

steps.title: Incubate 1h at room temperature on shaker
steps.instruction: Incubate 1h at room temperature on shaker.

steps.title: Wash 3 x 5 min in TBST
steps.instruction: Wash 3 x 5 min in TBST.

steps.title: Re-block the membrane and continue as...
steps.instruction: Re-block the membrane and continue as described above for the housekeeping proteins glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate dehydrogenase (GAPDH) and β-actin: a) primary rabbit monoclonal anti-mouse β-actin 13E5 antibody (1/1000): -Incubation primary antibody: 1.5hrs at room temperature in TBST/5% milk b) primary rabbit monoclonal anti-mouse GAPDH antibody (1/2000): -Incubation primary antibody: overnight at +4°C in TBST/5% milk rabbit monoclonal anti-mouse β-actin 13E5 antibody Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #4970L rabbit monoclonal anti-mouse GAPDH antibody Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #2118L
